definitions: 激素：由体内腺体或组织分泌、用于传递信号并调节身体功能的化学物质。

examples.text: At first detection of low water levels, sensory receptors in the brain's hypothalamus signal the release of antidiuretic hormone. When it reaches the kidneys, it creates aquaporins, special channels that enable blood to absorb and retain more water.
examples.explanation: 这句话说明：当体内水分偏低时，大脑下丘脑中的感受器会发出信号，促使身体释放抗利尿激素（antidiuretic hormone）。这种激素到达肾脏后，会帮助形成水通道，使血液保留更多水分。这里 hormone 指“激素”，即在体内传递调节信号的化学物质。

source.text: What would happen if you didn’t drink water? - Mia Nacamulli
